overview: I upgraded my RAG pipeline from ChromaDB to Pinecone, added agentic retrieval where Claude decides when/how to search, and built an MCP-pattern tool server powering a multi-agent Strategy Assistant v3 with Planner → Workers → Synthesizer architecture.

keyPoints.title: Pinecone solves ChromaDB's persistence and concurrency failures
Agentic RAG scored 4.3 vs 4.0 but cost 66% more tokens
MCP pattern: define tools once, every agent gets them automatically
Strategy Assistant v3 uses real Pinecone data and 3 worker agents
Idempotent upserts prevent duplicate vectors on re-ingestion
